testsuite.name: com.audioeq.equalizer.PerformanceBenchmarkTest

testcase.name: single filter processes samples efficiently

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: Should process at least 50,000 samples per ms, got 26683.032259786003

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Should process at least 50,000 samples per ms, got 26683.032259786003 at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at testcase.name: equalizer processes buffer efficiently

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: Should process at least 500,000 samples per ms, got 10417.037553216922
